buddy: Aww man! I can't believe I locked myself out again!
man: Hang on buddy!
buddy: Oh my God! What happened here? Did you do all this?
man: I sure did.
buddy: Why?
man: Well, I just thought it'd make me feel good to do something nice for my friend.
buddy: Well, you're amazing.
man: Oh no-no-no. This is amazing.
buddy: A TV as if it appears from nowhere! That's the dream! Man, how did you afford this stuff?
man: Well, y'know I'm 29. I mean who needs a savings account.
buddy: Oh, you are the best friends anyone has ever had.
man: Oh, I don't know.
